---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## The problem this would solve

What current workflow is awkward, slow, or missing? Concrete examples beat
abstract descriptions.

## Proposed solution

What would the feature look like, from a user's point of view? Sketches,
mock CLI invocations, or example YAML are great.

## Alternatives considered

Other ways you've thought about solving this, and why the proposed solution
is better.

## Additional context

Related issues, prior art in other tools, or constraints (e.g., must work
with current schema, must run offline, etc).
